name: ProMIS Neurosciences Inc. Common Shares
summary: ProMIS Neurosciences Inc. is a biotechnology company focused on developing therapeutics for neurodegenerative diseases, particularly Alzheimer's disease and amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS). The company's technology platform is based on identifying and targeting misfolded proteins implicated in these diseases. ProMIS Neurosciences is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
